title: If you use Google, you're training its AI. Here's how to opt out.
title_zh: 如果你使用谷歌，你正在训练其人工智能。以下是退出方法。

sentences.en: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google's privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as "images, files, and audio and video recordings," to improve its AI models.
sentences.zh: 请将此视为一则迟来的公共服务公告：谷歌最近对其隐私设置进行了一项更改，允许公司存储更多您的数据，包括"图像、文件以及音频和视频录音"等媒体内容，以改进其人工智能模型。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】冒号后的句子结构复杂，包含现在分词短语作目的状语(to improve its AI models)。

mc_quiz.question: What is Google storing to improve its AI models according to the article?
options: A. User search history
B. Personal data including media files
C. Location information
D. Email contacts
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了谷歌存储的数据类型，包括"images, files, and audio and video recordings"。

translation_task.en: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google's privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as "images, files, and audio and video recordings," to improve its AI models.
translation_task.zh: 请将此视为一则迟来的公共服务公告：谷歌最近对其隐私设置进行了一项更改，允许公司存储更多您的数据，包括"图像、文件以及音频和视频录音"等媒体内容，以改进其人工智能模型。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了复杂句型的翻译，特别是包含引号和列举内容的句子结构，以及专业术语如"PSA"和"AI models"的准确翻译。

quiz.question: What is Google storing to improve its AI models according to the article?
options: A. User search history
B. Personal data including media files
C. Location information
D. Email contacts
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了谷歌存储的数据类型，包括"images, files, and audio and video recordings"。

title: Diablo 4's Massive Mythic Item Changes Aren't Finding Many Fans
title_zh: 《暗黑破坏神4》的重大神话装备改动并未获得玩家青睐

sentences.en: Diablo 4 Season 14 dramatically reworked Mythic items in Blizzard's ARPG going forward, and judging from early feedback, it's a change that isn't going over well.
sentences.zh: 《暗黑破坏神4》第14赛季对暴雪的ARPG游戏中的神话装备进行了彻底重做，根据早期反馈来看，这一改动并未获得玩家青睐。
sentences.grammar: 【现在进行时与将来时结合】使用'going forward'表示从现在开始持续到将来的动作，'isn't going over well'表示当前状态。

words.meaning: v. 重新加工；彻底修改

sentences.en: Season of Death Awakening launched on June 30 and introduced what Blizzard coined Mythic Uniques 3.0, a new system where any of the game's hundreds of Unique items could be found (or turned into) even stronger Mythic versions.
sentences.zh: 死亡觉醒赛季于6月30日上线，推出了暴雪称之为'神话装备3.0'的新系统，在这个系统中，游戏中的数百件独特装备都可以被找到（或转化）为更强大的神话版本。
sentences.grammar: 【过去分词作后置定语】'what Blizzard coined'作为'what'引导的名词性从句，'launched'和'introduced'为并列谓语。

sentences.en: In theory, it would open up the game's endgame build options and give players more choices when it comes to outfitting their characters.
sentences.zh: 理论上，这一系统将开放游戏的后期构筑选项，让玩家在装备角色时有更多选择。
sentences.grammar: 【情态动词would表示推测】'would'在此处表示对未来的推测或假设，'when it comes to'是固定表达，意为'当涉及...时'。

sentences.en: Far from just a temporary seasonal change, Blizzard stated it intended for Mythic Uniques 3.0 to be a permanent part of the game going forward.
sentences.zh: 这绝非仅仅是暂时的赛季改动，暴雪表示他们打算让神话装备3.0成为游戏从现在开始永久的一部分。
sentences.grammar: 【'Far from'表示否定】'Far from'后接名词或动名词，表示'远非，绝非'，与后面的意思形成对比。

mc_quiz.question: What is the main issue with the new Mythic Uniques 3.0 system according to the article?
options: A. It was only available for a limited time during Season 14
B. It reduced the number of unique items in the game
C. It added more randomness to Mythics
D. It completely removed all previous unique items
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章提到新系统的缺点是增加了神话装备的随机性，请查找相关描述。

translation_task.en: Far from just a temporary seasonal change, Blizzard stated it intended for Mythic Uniques 3.0 to be a permanent part of the game going forward.
translation_task.zh: 这绝非仅仅是暂时的赛季改动，暴雪表示他们打算让神话装备3.0成为游戏从现在开始永久的一部分。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了'Far from'表示否定的用法以及'intend for'表示'打算让...'的句型结构。

quiz.question: What is the main issue with the new Mythic Uniques 3.0 system according to the article?
options: A. It was only available for a limited time during Season 14
B. It reduced the number of unique items in the game
C. It added more randomness to Mythics
D. It completely removed all previous unique items
quiz.hint: 提示：文章提到新系统的缺点是增加了神话装备的随机性，请查找相关描述。

title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
title_zh: OpenAI提议向美国主权财富基金捐赠5%股权

sentences.en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.
sentences.zh: 据报道，OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼提议将公司5%的股权捐赠给美国主权财富基金，这重新引发了关于让公众分享人工智能热潮带来的经济收益的讨论。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时态与现在分词作状语结构

words.meaning: adj. 主权的；至高无上的
v. 使复苏；重新唤起（revive的现在分词）

mc_quiz.question: What percentage of equity did OpenAI CEO Sam Altman propose to donate to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund?
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章第一句明确提到了具体的百分比数字。

translation_task.en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.
translation_task.zh: 据报道，OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼提议将公司5%的股权捐赠给美国主权财富基金，这重新引发了关于让公众分享人工智能热潮带来的经济收益的讨论。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了长句中现在分词作结果状语的结构，以及专业术语'equity'和'sovereign wealth fund'的准确翻译。

quiz.question: What percentage of equity did OpenAI CEO Sam Altman propose to donate to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund?
quiz.hint: 提示：文章第一句明确提到了具体的百分比数字。

title: $2.50 Steam Sale Has Everyone Smashing The Surveillance State
title_zh: 2.5美元Steam促销活动让众人纷纷对抗监控国家

sentences.en: One of Ubisoft's most underrated games, Watch Dogs 2, is on a super steep sale on Steam right now.
sentences.zh: 育碧公司最被低估的游戏之一《看门狗2》目前正在Steam上进行超级大幅度的促销。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】同位语结构介绍游戏名称

sentences.en: So steep, in fact, that it seems to have inspired a new crop of folks to trawl through the technocratic world of digitized San Francisco to put an end to the surveillance state at a time when we're all under some sort of surveillance IRL.
sentences.zh: 事实上，折扣幅度如此之大，以至于似乎激励了一批新人去探索数字化旧金山的技术官僚世界，终结监控国家，而此时我们在现实生活中都处于某种监控之下。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】结果状语从句，at a time when引导的时间状语从句

words.meaning: abbr. In Real Life (现实生活中)

sentences.en: Over on the game's Steam store page, you can pick Watch Dogs 2 for just $2.50 until Thursday, July 9.
sentences.zh: 在该游戏的Steam商店页面，你可以以仅2.50美元的价格购买《看门狗2》，促销将持续到7月9日星期四。

sentences.en: That's a 95% discount for a game that normally retails for $50.
sentences.zh: 这款游戏原价50美元，现在相当于打了95折。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】定语从句修饰游戏

sentences.en: And that's just the base game! If you wanted to grab the DLC--which includes new cars, co-op adventures, outfits, weapons, world missions, and more--then you can snatch up either the Deluxe Edition for $3 or the Gold Edition for $4.
sentences.zh: 这还只是基础游戏！如果你想下载DLC（包括新汽车、合作冒险、服装、武器、世界任务等），那么你可以花3美元购买豪华版或4美元购买黄金版。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号插入语解释DLC内容

mc_quiz.question: What is the special offer for Watch Dogs 2 on Steam?
options: A. 50% discount on the base game
B. 95% discount on the base game
C. Free DLC with the base game
D. Buy one get one free offer
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了折扣百分比，请查找相关信息。

translation_task.en: So steep, in fact, that it seems to have inspired a new crop of folks to trawl through the technocratic world of digitized San Francisco to put an end to the surveillance state at a time when we're all under some sort of surveillance IRL.
translation_task.zh: 事实上，折扣幅度如此之大，以至于似乎激励了一批新人去探索数字化旧金山的技术官僚世界，终结监控国家，而此时我们在现实生活中都处于某种监控之下。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了结果状语从句、同位语结构以及破折号插入语的翻译技巧。

quiz.question: What is the special offer for Watch Dogs 2 on Steam?
options: A. 50% discount on the base game
B. 95% discount on the base game
C. Free DLC with the base game
D. Buy one get one free offer
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了折扣百分比，请查找相关信息。

title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
title_zh: 艾什顿·库彻离开声创投，与摩根·贝勒共同创立新风投公司

sentences.en: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs.
sentences.zh: 声创投通过在行业领先的AI实验室进行集中、高信念的投资建立了其声誉。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】过去完成时态表示过去某时已经完成的动作，介词短语'on...'表示方式或基础。

sentences.en: while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.
sentences.zh: 而库彻的新基金似乎正在追逐那些公司之下的层面——为它们提供动力和支持的基础设施和能源。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】while引导的对比状语从句，破折号后的内容是对'layer'的具体解释。

mc_quiz.question: What is the main difference between Sound Ventures and Kutcher's new fund according to the article?
options: A. Sound Ventures focuses on AI labs while Kutcher's fund focuses on infrastructure
B. Sound Ventures has a larger investment portfolio
C. Kutcher's fund only invests in energy companies
D. Sound Ventures is newer than Kutcher's fund
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章明确指出了两家投资公司在投资重点上的差异，请关注'while'引导的对比句。

translation_task.en: while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.
translation_task.zh: 而库彻的新基金似乎正在追逐那些公司之下的层面——为它们提供动力和支持的基础设施和能源。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了破折号作为解释性插入语的翻译技巧，以及'chasing'在商业语境中的引申义翻译。

options: A. Sound Ventures focuses on AI labs while Kutcher's fund focuses on infrastructure
B. Sound Ventures has a larger investment portfolio

quiz.hint: 提示：文章明确指出了两家投资公司在投资重点上的差异，请关注'while'引导的对比句。

title: Profoundly Disappointed: Companies Respond To Sony's Decision To End Disc Support
title_zh: 深感失望：各公司回应索尼停止光盘支持的决定

sentences.en: A number of companies have responded to the news that Sony will no longer support physical PlayStation discs beginning in 2028.
sentences.zh: 多家公司已对索尼将于2028年起不再支持PlayStation实体光盘的消息作出回应。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时与将来时的结合使用，表示对将来事件的反应。

sentences.en: That includes iam8bit, a company known for its physical gaming collectibles, which said it is "profoundly disappointed" by the news.
sentences.zh: 其中包括iam8bit公司，该公司以实体游戏收藏品闻名，并表示对这一消息"深感失望"。

sentences.en: "Physical games are vital to games preservation, ownership, and consumer choice, values that have guided iam8bit since our first physical release in 2016," the company said.
sentences.zh: 该公司表示："实体游戏对游戏保存、所有权和消费者选择至关重要，这些价值观自2016年我们首次发布实体产品以来一直指导着iam8bit的发展。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】包含插入语和定语从句的复杂句结构。

words.meaning: adj. 至关重要的，必不可少的

sentences.en: The company added that it remains committed to these values.
sentences.zh: 该公司补充说，它仍然致力于这些价值观。

sentences.en: "Long live physical media," iam8bit said in its sign-off.
sentences.zh: iam8bit在结束语中表示："实体媒体万岁。"

mc_quiz.question: What is iam8bit's main concern about Sony's decision to end disc support?
options: A. It will increase the cost of games
B. It threatens game preservation, ownership, and consumer choice
C. It will reduce collaboration with other companies
D. It will affect the release of vinyl soundtracks
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：查看iam8bit公司声明中提到的核心价值观。

translation_task.en: "Physical games are vital to games preservation, ownership, and consumer choice, values that have guided iam8bit since our first physical release in 2016," the company said.
translation_task.zh: 该公司表示："实体游戏对游戏保存、所有权和消费者选择至关重要，这些价值观自2016年我们首次发布实体产品以来一直指导着iam8bit的发展。"
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了包含插入语和定语从句的复杂句翻译，以及专业术语的准确表达。

quiz.question: What is iam8bit's main concern about Sony's decision to end disc support?
options: A. It will increase the cost of games
B. It threatens game preservation, ownership, and consumer choice
C. It will reduce collaboration with other companies
D. It will affect the release of vinyl soundtracks
quiz.hint: 提示：查看iam8bit公司声明中提到的核心价值观。

title: Love And Deepspace Cancels Its New Love Interest After Fan Backlash
title_zh: 《爱与深空》因粉丝反对取消新角色恋情线

sentences.en: Shortly after developer Papergames announced the addition of Valko--a new love interest in the mobile action dating sim Love and Deepspace --the backlash from fans has spilled into the real world.
sentences.zh: 在开发商Papergames宣布在手机动作恋爱模拟游戏《爱与深空》中新增角色Valko后不久，来自粉丝的反对声浪已经蔓延到现实世界。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号的使用，插入语结构

words.meaning: n. 强烈反对，强烈反应

sentences.en: Now, Papergames is reversing course by canceling Valko's debut and pledging to focus on the five other love interests who are already in the game.
sentences.zh: 现在，Papergames已经改变决定，取消了Valko的登场，并承诺专注于游戏中已有的五位恋爱角色。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在进行时表示当前正在发生的变化，by doing sth.方式状语

words.meaning: phr. 改变决定，改变方向

sentences.en: "We recognize that we moved forward with the introduction of Valko before we were truly ready," reads the statement posted to Love and Deepspace's Instagram account.
sentences.zh: 发布在《爱与深空》Instagram账号上的声明写道："我们意识到在真正准备好之前就推出了Valko角色。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】引述句结构，主谓倒装（reads the statement）

sentences.en: "In doing so, we let down the players who have supported us from the start, and we also fell short of delivering the experience that players anticipating Valko deserved."
sentences.zh: "这样做我们辜负了从一开始就支持我们的玩家，也未能达到期待Valko的玩家应得的游戏体验。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时表示持续到现在的动作，fall short of doing sth.结构

mc_quiz.question: Why did Papergames decide to cancel Valko's debut?
options: A. Because they didn't have enough resources to develop the character.
B. Because fans strongly opposed the addition of a new love interest.
C. Because they realized they weren't ready to introduce Valko properly.
D. Because they wanted to focus on other game features instead.
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：查看声明中提到的关于准备工作的内容。

translation_task.en: "In doing so, we let down the players who have supported us from the start, and we also fell short of delivering the experience that players anticipating Valko deserved."
translation_task.zh: "这样做我们辜负了从一开始就支持我们的玩家，也未能达到期待Valko的玩家应得的游戏体验。"
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了英语中fall short of doing sth.的表达方式，以及现在分词短语作后置定语的翻译技巧。

quiz.question: Why did Papergames decide to cancel Valko's debut?
options: A. Because they didn't have enough resources to develop the character.
B. Because fans strongly opposed the addition of a new love interest.
C. Because they realized they weren't ready to introduce Valko properly.
D. Because they wanted to focus on other game features instead.
quiz.hint: 提示：查看声明中提到的关于准备工作的内容。

title: Xbox Devs Call For Worker Protections Ahead Of Likely Layoffs
title_zh: Xbox开发者呼吁在可能裁员前加强员工保护

sentences.en: Earlier this month, rumors began to spread about potentially massive layoffs coming to Microsoft's Xbox gaming division this summer.
sentences.zh: 本月早些时候，有关微软Xbox游戏部门今年夏天可能进行大规模裁员的谣言开始传播。
sentences.grammar: 【时态与情态】使用一般过去时描述已发生事件，'potentially'表示可能性

sentences.en: While the majority of those cuts don't appear to have happened yet, game developers under Xbox have come together to push for more layoff protections for their members.
sentences.zh: 尽管大部分裁员似乎尚未发生，但Xbox旗下的游戏开发者已经团结起来，为其成员争取更多的裁员保护。
sentences.grammar: 【让步状语从句】'While'引导的让步状语从句，表示尽管...

sentences.en: Members of the United Video Game Workers and representatives from workers at Microsoft's first-party studios--including Bethesda's parent company Zenimax, as well as Activision Blizzard--were present at a press conference conducted by the Communications Workers of America.
sentences.zh: 美国视频游戏工会成员以及微软第一方工作室的工人代表——包括贝塞斯达的母公司ZeniMax，以及动视暴雪——都参加了由美国通信工会举办的新闻发布会。
sentences.grammar: 【插入语】破折号之间的内容为插入语，提供补充信息

words.meaning: n. 工作室（studio的复数形式）

sentences.en: Collectively, they pushed for enhanced layoff protections for all Xbox workers, including advance warning of impending layoffs, temporary hiring freezes to give the remaining devs a chance to advance internally, and tw...
sentences.zh: 他们集体呼吁为所有Xbox员工加强裁员保护，包括提前预警即将到来的裁员、临时冻结招聘以让剩余的开发人员有机会内部晋升，以及...
sentences.grammar: 【并列结构】'including'引导的并列结构，列举具体措施

words.meaning: adj. 即将发生的，迫近的

mc_quiz.question: What specific protections are Xbox developers pushing for according to the article?
options: A. Higher salaries and better working conditions
B. Advance warning of layoffs, temporary hiring freezes, and internal advancement opportunities
C. Stock options and profit-sharing plans
D. Union recognition and collective bargaining rights
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章第二段明确提到了开发者们呼吁的具体保护措施。

translation_task.en: Members of the United Video Game Workers and representatives from workers at Microsoft's first-party studios--including Bethesda's parent company Zenimax, as well as Activision Blizzard--were present at a press conference conducted by the Communications Workers of America.
translation_task.zh: 美国视频游戏工会成员以及微软第一方工作室的工人代表——包括贝塞斯达的母公司ZeniMax，以及动视暴雪——都参加了由美国通信工会举办的新闻发布会。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了长句中插入语的处理技巧，以及专业名词的准确翻译。

quiz.question: What specific protections are Xbox developers pushing for according to the article?
options: A. Higher salaries and better working conditions
B. Advance warning of layoffs, temporary hiring freezes, and internal advancement opportunities
C. Stock options and profit-sharing plans
D. Union recognition and collective bargaining rights
quiz.hint: 提示：文章第二段明确提到了开发者们呼吁的具体保护措施。

sentences.en: The Steam Machine listings GameSpot has viewed so far are all for "confirmed reservations."

title: Europe is pushing back on Washington's chip war
title_zh: 欧洲对华盛顿的芯片战争发起反击

sentences.en: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.
sentences.zh: 正如ASML首席执行官克里斯托夫·福凯在5月告诉TechCrunch的那样，中国目前能够购买的是老一代深紫外光工具——这些设备大约在十年前首次发货——而这些正是《MATCH法案》现在将禁止的机器。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】本句使用了复杂的主语从句和插入语结构，包含破折号补充说明。

words.meaning: adj. 禁止进入的，禁止使用的

mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章明确提到中国目前能购买的是哪一代设备，以及这些设备何时首次发货。

title: Xbox Series S, The "Cheap" Option, Now Costs As Much As Series X Did Six Years Ago
title_zh: Xbox Series S，这款"廉价"选项，现在的价格与六年前Series X首发时相同

sentences.en: When Xbox Series S launched alongside Series X and PS5, it presented a compelling argument: Play all of the same games as elsewhere, albeit with lesser performance and visuals, for way cheaper.
sentences.zh: 当Xbox Series S与Series X和PS5同时发布时，它提出了一个令人信服的论点：以便宜得多的价格玩到所有与其他平台相同的游戏，尽管性能和视觉效果较差。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】although引导的让步状语从句，破折号后的补充说明结构

words.meaning: adj. 令人信服的，引人入胜的

sentences.en: $300 felt surprisingly reasonable, giving you a way to save $100 compared to the cheapest PS5 and $200 compared to the more premium PS5 and Series X models.
sentences.zh: 300美元的价格感觉出奇地合理，让你比最便宜的PS5节省100美元，比更高端的PS5和Series X型号节省200美元。

sentences.en: With the Series S turning six later this year, you'd expect it--like every other console--to get cheaper over time, as has always been the case.
sentences.zh: 随着Series S在今年晚些时候迎来六周年，你会期望它像其他所有游戏机一样随时间推移而降价，这向来是行业惯例。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号插入语，as引导的定语从句

sentences.en: But this is 2026, baby. Welcome to hell.
sentences.zh: 但这是2026年，宝贝。欢迎来到地狱。

sentences.en: Beginning August 1, Xbox Series S will cost as much as Xbox Series X did at launch in November 2020 : $500.
sentences.zh: 从8月1日开始，Xbox Series S的价格将与2020年11月首发时的Xbox Series X相同：500美元。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】as...as比较结构，did替代cost避免重复

options: A. Xbox Series S is cheaper than other gaming consoles

mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章重点讨论了Xbox Series S价格的变化情况，特别是与首发价格的对比。

title: Sonic's New Chaos Hunt Game Includes Some Fine Print You Shouldn't Skip
title_zh: 索尼克新游戏《混沌狩猎》包含不应忽视的细则

sentences.en: The 35th anniversary of Sonic the Hedgehog is arriving later this year, and one of the ways that Sega is celebrating the event is a new ARG game called Chaos Hunt.
sentences.zh: 刺猬索尼克35周年庆典将于今年晚些时候举行，世嘉庆祝这一活动的方式之一是一款名为《混沌狩猎》的新ARG游戏。
sentences.grammar: 【复合句】包含两个并列分句，由and连接，描述了两个相关事实。

sentences.en: Fans have been invited to hunt for some missing Chaos Emeralds, but players should probably check out the fine print before they take part in it.
sentences.zh: 粉丝们被邀请去寻找一些失踪的混沌翡翠，但玩家在参与前最好先查看细则。
sentences.grammar: 【复合句】包含由but连接的两个转折关系的分句，使用了现在完成时被动语态。

words.meaning: n. 细则，小字印刷的条款

sentences.en: As noted by user Luna Leo on social media, the terms of service for Chaos Hunt requires players to agree to AI model training and to sharing their details with third-party AI vendors.
sentences.zh: 正如社交媒体用户Luna Leo所指出的，《混沌狩猎》的服务条款要求玩家同意AI模型训练，并与第三方AI供应商共享他们的详细信息。
sentences.grammar: 【复杂句】包含由as引导的状语从句，主语是the terms of service，谓语是requires，后面接两个并列的宾语。

sentences.en: The terms note that "We use reasonable efforts to prohibit [third-party] providers from using any of your personal information for the purposes of developing and improving their AI models."
sentences.zh: 条款中写道："我们会尽合理努力禁止[第三方]供应商使用您的任何个人信息来开发和改进他们的AI模型。"
sentences.grammar: 【间接引语】包含一个直接引语，使用了引号，引语中包含目的状语for the purposes of...

mc_quiz.question: What do players need to agree to according to the terms of service for Chaos Hunt?
options: A. Sharing their gaming achievements with other players
B. Participating in AI model training and sharing details with third-party AI vendors
C. Paying additional fees for special in-game items
D. Creating their own content based on Sonic characters
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：请仔细阅读第二段第一句，其中明确提到了服务条款的要求。

translation_task.en: As noted by user Luna Leo on social media, the terms of service for Chaos Hunt requires players to agree to AI model training and to sharing their details with third-party AI vendors.
translation_task.zh: 正如社交媒体用户Luna Leo所指出的，《混沌狩猎》的服务条款要求玩家同意AI模型训练，并与第三方AI供应商共享他们的详细信息。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了英语中被动语态的使用（have been invited）以及复杂句式结构，特别是包含多个并列成分的句子翻译技巧。

title: AMD's FSR Upscaling 4.1 Comes To Older GPUs, Steam Machine And Xbox ROG Ally Support On The Way
title_zh: AMD的FSR 4.1技术支持旧显卡，Steam主机和Xbox ROG Ally适配即将到来

sentences.en: AMD has announced that owners of RDNA 3 GPUs can now enjoy the benefits offered by its latest version of AI-powered upscaling, FSR 4.1.
sentences.zh: AMD宣布，RDNA 3显卡的现在可以享受到其最新版本的AI驱动超分辨率技术FSR 4.1带来的好处。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时态表示最近发生且持续影响现在的事件

sentences.en: This comes a few weeks earlier than its July estimate, with the promise for more devices down the line, too.
sentences.zh: 这项技术的发布比AMD七月份的预计时间提前了几周，并且未来还将支持更多设备。

sentences.en: FSR Upscaling 4.1 functions similarly to other upscaling technologies on the market, and comes much closer to the performance and quality of Nvidia's market-leading DLSS than previous iterations.
sentences.zh: FSR 4.1技术的功能与市场上其他超分辨率技术相似，但在性能和质量上比之前的版本更接近NVIDIA市场领先的DLSS技术。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】比较级结构，表示与竞争对手技术的对比

words.meaning: n. 迭代版本；更新版本

sentences.en: It's the same technology that underpins the PlayStation 5 Pro's PSSR 2, with Sony layering on its own work on top of what AMD has engineering here.
sentences.zh: 这项技术是PS5 Pro的PSSR 2技术的基础，索尼在此基础上添加了自己的工作成果。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】定语从句和with复合结构

sentences.en: The upscaling suite was previously exclusive to the company's latest GPUs, the RX 9070 and 9070 XT, but will now be available to many, many more RDNA 3 G...
sentences.zh: 这套超分辨率技术之前仅限于公司的最新显卡RX 9070和9070 XT，但现在将适用于更多RDNA 3显卡...
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】被动语态和对比结构

mc_quiz.question: What is the main advantage of FSR 4.1 compared to previous versions?
options: A. It's now available for more RDNA 3 GPUs
B. It offers performance and quality closer to Nvidia's DLSS

title: Tactical Depth: Inside the Swiss-System Brackets of Competitive CS2

sentences.en: The Swiss-system format has become a staple of competitive CS2 tournaments, creating high-stakes match-ups.
sentences.zh: 瑞士轮赛制已成为 CS2 职业比赛的常客，创造了极高悬念的强强对决。
sentences.grammar:: 【现在完成时】has become 表示过去开始并延续至今的动作或状态影响；分词短语 creating... 作伴随状语。

sentences.en: In this system, teams with identical Win-Loss records face each other in every round.
sentences.zh: 在此赛制下，每一轮中胜负战绩相同的战队都会相互交手。
sentences.grammar: 【主谓一致】teams with identical records 为复数，主语中心词为 teams，谓语动词为原形 face。

sentences.en: Team Spirit has dominated the scene, largely driven by the explosive entries of their prodigy, donk.
sentences.zh: Team Spirit 战队统治了赛场，这主要得益于他们的天才选手 donk 的爆发性突破能力。
sentences.grammar: 【过去分词短语作状语】driven by... 表示被动和原因，说明战队主导地位是由 donk 推动的。

sentences.en: His unparalleled mechanical skill allows him to secure space and break through solid defensive setups.
sentences.zh: 他无与伦比的枪法和操作控制力使他能够夺取空间并突破稳固的防守站位。
sentences.grammar: 【动词不定式】allows sb to do sth 意为允许/使某人能够做某事，to secure 和 break 为并列不定式后置。

words.meaning: adj. 无与伦比的，空前的

sentences.en:: Chinese Football, an indie rock band from Wuhan, captures the nostalgic essence of youth through their melodic emo rock.

sentences.grammar: 【同位语】an indie rock band from Wuhan 作为主语 Chinese Football 的同位语进行补充解释。

sentences.en: Their instruments weave intricate guitar riffs, conveying both melancholy and warmth.

sentences.grammar: 【现在分词短语作伴随状语】conveying... 伴随谓语动作 weave 发生，表示伴随状态和结果。

sentences.en: The hit single 'Electric Girl' stands out for its driving bassline and bittersweet emotional expression.
sentences.zh: 热门单曲《霓虹甜心》因其动感十足的贝斯线条与苦乐参半的情感表达而脱颖而出。
sentences.grammar: 【介词短语表示原因】stands out for... 意为“因...而引人注目/脱颖而出”。

sentences.en: Listeners are instantly transported to a dreamlike city pop landscape filled with neon lights.

title: Echoes of Independence: The Evolution of Indie Music Genres

sentences.en: During the 1980s, underground cassette cultures and independent record labels bypassed mainstream distribution channels.
sentences.zh: 在 20 世纪 80 年代，地下磁带文化和独立唱片公司绕过了主流发行渠道。
sentences.grammar: 【时间状语与并列主语】During the 1980s 作时间状语，cultures 和 labels 为并列主语，谓语 bypassed 意为“绕过”。

sentences.en: This DIY ethos allowed diverse genres like post-punk, dream pop, and lo-fi to flourish in obscurity.
sentences.zh:: 这种 DIY（自己动手）的精神让后朋克、梦幻流行和低保真等多种流派在默默无闻中蓬勃发展。
sentences.grammar: 【动词不定式】allowed sb/sth to do sth 允许某物做某事，to flourish 作宾语补足语。

sentences.en: The rise of digital streaming platforms has democratized music production, allowing independent artists to reach global audiences.
sentences.zh: 数字流媒体平台的兴起使音乐制作走向大众化，让独立艺术家能够触及全球听众。
sentences.grammar: 【现在分词短语作伴随状语】allowing... 伴随着主句的 has democratized 动作，表示其带来的影响与结果。

words.meaning: v. 使民主化，使大众化

mc_quiz.question: What allowed diverse music genres to flourish in obscurity during the 80s?
options: A. TV talent competitions
B. Massive corporate funding
C. The DIY ethos and underground cassette cultures
D. Strict copyright regulations

translation_task.en: The rise of digital streaming platforms has democratized music production, allowing independent artists to reach global audiences.
translation_task.zh: 数字流媒体平台的兴起使音乐制作走向大众化，让独立艺术家能够触及全球听众。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了动词 democratize (大众化) 翻译处理及现在分词作伴随状语的句型转换。

title_zh: 独立的回响：独立音乐流派的演变
